creator: alexey@ocaml.nl
text:
I have exactly the same problem between ghc and iconv on FreeBSD 12-p2. While I do have gcc installed, it is not a default compiler:

❯ cc --version
FreeBSD clang version 14.0.5 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-14.0.5-0-gc12386ae247c)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd13.2
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
